LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SCHINDLER ELEVATOR CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO ORANGE COUNTY IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ORANGE COUNTY. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT ALL DEFENDANTS ARE DOMICILED IN OTHER COUNTIES, THAT THERE IS NO BASIS FOR VENUE IN SAN FRANCISCO, AND THAT VENUE IN ORANGE COUNTY IS PROPER. ANY APPLICATION PURSUANT TO CCP 397 MUST BE DIRECTED TO THE COURT IN ORANGE COUNTY. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: TRINA AYALA CSR # 12964 (301/PJB)
